issue.message: Field requires API level 33 (current min is 26): `android.content.Context#RECEIVER_EXPORTED`
Field requires API level 28 (current min is 26): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_DATA_USAGE_SETTINGS`
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
`reloadReceiver` is missing `RECEIVER_EXPORTED` or `RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED` flag for unprotected broadcasts registered for com.devrinth.launchpad.ACTION_SHOW
`reloadReceiver` is missing `RECEIVER_EXPORTED` or `RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED` flag for unprotected broadcasts registered for com.devrinth.launchpad.ACTION_SHOW
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.7.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-compiler than 2.7.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-ktx than 2.7.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.16.0 is available: 1.17.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of org.mockito:mockito-core than 5.2.0 is available: 5.3.1
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0
"wanna" is a common misspelling; did you mean "want to"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="home_alter_summary">or if you don\'t wanna replace your assistant</string>

issue.message: The resource string "app_name" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "home_banner_text" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "search_google_query" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "search_duckduckgo_query" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "search_bing_query" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "link_kofi" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "link_privacy" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "link_website" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
The resource string "link_mail" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Very long vector path (1898 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (904 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (981 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Use a `layout_width` of `0dp` instead of `wrap_content` for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:attr/selectableItemBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Launchpad`)

When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/baseline_search_24"` to better support right-to-left layouts
